headline: Block Resets Management With AI As Cash App Adds Installment Transfers
summary: Block (NYSE:XYZ) plans a permanent organizational overhaul that replaces many middle management roles with AI-driven models to create flatter teams focused on individual contributors. Separately, Block's Cash App has introduced a feature that lets users split peer to peer payments into installment plans, a first for major U.S. personal finance apps. These changes reflect a push to rethink how Block operates internally and how its consumer products handle everyday payments. For investors,...
